description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular head made of dark metal, featuring two broad striking faces and a prominent metal spike on the top. The head is adorned with gold-colored bands on each side and a stylized emblem or crest etched into the front and back faces, adding a decorative and possibly symbolic touch. The hammer's head shows some visible wear, including scratches and small dents, indicating use. The handle is straight, made of wood with a dark finish, and reinforced at the base with a metal collar and a matching gold accent. The grip area appears smooth, with no visible ergonomic enhancements or texturing. This hammer is designed for heavy impact tasks and would be suitable for demolition or ceremonial purposes in an urban environment.
description: A large, ornate sledgehammer with a dark metal head, gold accents, a central spike, and a straight wooden handle. The head features a decorative crest and visible wear marks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the decorative crest, gold bands, and central spike on the hammer's head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular profile of the head, visible wear marks, and the spike's alignment.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, showing the crest, gold bands, and spike, with less visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the rectangular head, wear marks, and the spike, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a dark finish, smooth surface, and a metal collar at the base
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head with two flat striking faces, a central metal spike on top, and gold-colored bands on each side
attribute_brand_or_logo: stylized crest or emblem visible on the front and back faces; no brand name visible
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible scratches and small dents on the head, especially on the sides
